findings.evidence: `nl -ba` shows lines 20-22 make the `product-points equivalence` claim, while `rg -n "pointsMulEquiv|AlgebraicGroup.Product" code/TauCeti/Algebra/AlgebraicGroup/FiniteTypeProduct.lean` has no hits.
findings.fix: Either add the promised compatibility lemmas with `AffineGroup.Product.pointsMulEquiv`, or weaken the docstring to say the points API is expressed by precomposition with the two tensor-product inclusions.
findings.issue: The module docstring claims the points API is connected to the existing `Product.pointsMulEquiv`, but this file neither imports `TauCeti.Algebra.AlgebraicGroup.Product` nor states any lemma involving `pointsMulEquiv`; it only proves raw restriction formulas along the inclusions.

summary: The new declarations are documented, but the module docstring overstates the API connection it actually provides.
